title: calcearia acuta
intro: Calcearia acuta, also known as the 'Chinese Club Moss', is a type of ancient, epiphytic plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its potential to lower blood pressure, boost the immune system, and act as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, Calcearia acuta is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and tonics that promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
